title: $itemcount
text: $itemcount Return the number of items in a list. $itemcount ( List ) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description List String Name of the variable, parameter, or field containing the list. Return Values Number of items in a list. Use Allowed in all component types. Description The $itemcount function enables you to determine how many items are in a list before processing each item. Example: Using $itemcount $1 = 0 $2 = $itemcount ("$mylist$") while $1 <= $2 $1 += 1 endwhile Copy Related Links List Handling in ProcScript Uniface provides ProcScript instructions that enable you to build lists, retrieve items from lists, and sort lists based on various criteria. $idpart Return the ID part of an associative list item. $valuepart Return the value part of an associative list item.
